title: Clarke and Robertson fear Scotland’s World Cup journey is over after Brazil defeat
description: Scotland’s manager Steve Clarke and captain Andy Robertson fear the country’s World Cup journey is over after a chastening defeat to Brazil in Miami

title: World Cup 2026: John McGinn & Steve Clarke rue Scotland mistakes against Brazil
description: Scotland will have to wait until potentially the early hours of Sunday to find out if their World Cup campaign will continue, but midfielder John McGinn suspects that is "unlikely" and head coach Steve Clarke suspects they are "going home".

title: Trump asks Congress for $87bn, mostly for 'urgent' Iran war costs
description: But the proposal faces an uphill battle and comes one day after Congress passed a resolution rebuking Trump's military action in Iran.
content:
The White House has asked lawmakers to approve $87.6bn (£66.5bn), mostly for "urgent needs" connected with the US war on Iran, a day after Congress passed a resolution rebuking the military action.

title: Switzerland vs Canada LIVE: FIFA World Cup Group B score, lineups, commentary & updates
description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC Radio 5 Live commentary as Switzerland take on Canada at BC Place Vancouver in Group B of the FIFA World Cup.
content:
Switzerland sealed their place in the last 32 of the World Cup by defeating co-hosts Canada to finish top of Group B.
